name: Demaciains Research Services
description: Market research, gap analysis, trend signals, algorithm reports, startup validation, and pricing strategy for AI agents and humans. ALL endpoints generate fresh dynamic data on every request. Payments via x402 protocol on Base network.
engine: Demaciains Dynamic Data Engine v3.5 — Client-Side Seeded PRNG

services.description: Structured market gap report identifying underserved digital markets with evidence, search volume estimates, and build complexity ratings.
Top 5 trending pain points from Reddit, Hacker News, and Product Hunt. Updated hourly. Structured JSON output.
Competitor gap analysis for any product niche. Returns structured JSON of gaps competitors are missing.
Backtested pattern analysis on market signals or datasets. For trading and strategy agents.
Multi-dimensional startup idea validation: 8-factor scoring, market sizing, risk matrix, revenue model, competitor landscape, and pivot suggestions.
Dynamic pricing optimization for digital products: conversion benchmarks, pricing psychology tactics, revenue projections, A/B test plans, and quick wins.
AI-powered revenue projection engine: 4-scenario forecasting, monthly trajectory with seasonality, growth levers, risk analysis, competitive benchmarks, and pricing optimization.
50 battle-tested AI prompts to 10x freelance income.
50 AI prompts to optimize e-commerce store conversions.
50 AI prompts to create viral content across all platforms.
Instagram algorithm reverse-engineered: ranking signals + exploitation framework (April 2026).
TikTok For You Page algorithm decoded + ready-to-use optimization prompts (April 2026).
YouTube recommendation engine breakdown + optimization playbook (April 2026).
LinkedIn feed ranking signals + professional reach strategies (April 2026).
X/Twitter timeline algorithm decoded + engagement maximization (April 2026).
Complete go-to-market strategy: positioning framework, channel prioritization, 4-phase launch plan, content calendar, budget allocation, and KPI targets.
Complete content strategy: topic clusters, SEO keyword strategy, platform-specific content plans, 4-week content calendar, distribution playbook, and repurposing matrix.
Deep competitive intelligence: competitor profiles, battlefield analysis, positioning map, threat assessment, SWOT, and strategic recommendations for any product niche.

capabilities.description: Generate complete go-to-market strategies with channel prioritization, messaging frameworks, and phased launch plans
Generate complete content strategies with topic clusters, SEO keyword planning, platform-specific content calendars, distribution playbooks, and repurposing matrices
